shortDescription: Stylish 3-bedroom freehold townhouse in Corktown with three levels of living space.
fullDescription: Welcome to 185 Parliament Street in the vibrant Corktown neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The sleeping quarters comprise 3 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
Minutes to parks, shops, and restaurants
